name: Elly May's Wedding Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in the boiling water in a large saucepan.
2. In a separate saucepan, boil together the sugar and 4 cups of water.
3. Add the pineapple juice, orange juice, and lemon juice to the hot syrup mixture. Allow it to cool completely.
4. Combine the dissolved gelatin and cooled fruit syrup mixtures. Pour into plastic containers.
5. Freeze until set, about 2-3 hours.
6. About 3 hours before serving, remove from the freezer.
7. Add the ginger ale just before serving.
8. Serve chilled. The punch will be slushy if served too soon after freezing.
